data.name: PageInvalid
data.value: Page number must be greater than 0

data.name: PageSizeInvalid
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100

data.name: CountryIdInvalid
data.value: Country ID must be greater than 0

data.name: EducationLevelIdInvalid
data.value: Education level ID must be greater than 0

data.name: DepartmentIdInvalid
data.value: Department ID must be greater than 0
